world.title: Japan issues ‘huge’ earthquake advisory after powerful 7.5 tremor; 80 cm tsunami recorded-top developments
world.summary: Japan issued a special advisory on Monday following a 7.5 magnitude earthquake off its northern coast, indicating an increased risk of a larger quake. The tremor triggered tsunami alerts, with an 80 cm wave recorded. Evacuations were initiated in affected areas as authorities assessed the situation and prepared for potential aftershocks and further seismic activity.

world.title: Trump screamed at aides, was kept out of war room after F-15E downing in Iran: WSJ
world.summary: US President Donald Trump reportedly screamed at aides for hours after two American airmen went missing following the downing of an F-15 Eagle over Iran on April 3. He was subsequently excluded from important war-room briefings during the crisis. The White House denied this account, asserting that Trump remained a steady leader during the situation.

world.title: 'Blockade of Iran ports hurdle to peace talks': Pak army chief Asim Munir tells Trump; how US prez reacted
world.summary: Pakistan Field Marshal Asim Munir informed US President Donald Trump that the blockade of Iranian ports poses a significant obstacle to resuming negotiations with Tehran. This statement was relayed by a Pakistani security source to Reuters. Trump acknowledged the concern but did not provide specific details on his response regarding the blockade or potential diplomatic actions.

business.title: Just South Politics Things: Robo Used For Election Campaign!
business.summary: In Tamil Nadu, a holographic image of a politician is being used in an election campaign, showcasing the unique and theatrical elements of South Indian politics. This innovative approach highlights the evolving strategies within the Indian electoral system. The use of technology in campaigning reflects a blend of tradition and modernity, drawing attention to the region's political dynamics.

business.title: Stock market today: Which are the top gainers and losers in Nifty50 and BSE Sensex today? Check list
business.summary: Dalal Street concluded Monday's trading session with benchmark indices Nifty50 and Sensex showing marginal gains. Investors exhibited caution due to escalating geopolitical tensions and increasing crude oil prices. The overall market sentiment remained flat, reflecting a careful approach among traders. Despite these challenges, both indices managed to end the day slightly higher amid the prevailing uncertainties.

business.title: Vedanta demerger: Anil Agarwal-led mining major fixes May 1 as record date, announces share allotment details
business.summary: Vedanta Limited, led by Anil Agarwal, has set May 1 as the record date for its proposed demerger. The company announced share allotment details on April 20, confirming the effective date for the demerger. This strategic move is part of Vedanta's ongoing restructuring efforts to enhance operational efficiency and shareholder value in the mining sector.

technology.title: How to Make a Professional AI Video in Under 30 Minutes (Step
technology.summary: Creating professional videos has become quicker and more accessible for solo creators, small business owners, and storytellers. Advances in technology allow individuals to produce high-quality videos in under 30 minutes. This shift addresses common frustrations associated with video creation, making it easier for anyone to share their stories online without the extensive time commitment previously required.

technology.title: Google Lists Best Practices For Read More Deep Links
technology.summary: Google has updated its snippet documentation to include best practices for enhancing the visibility of "Read more" deep links in Search results. The new section outlines three specific strategies that can improve the chances of a page being featured with these deep links. This update aims to assist webmasters in optimizing their content for better search performance.

technology.title: Microsoft is going after every part of Windows 11’s legacy UI in major design update
technology.summary: Microsoft announced a comprehensive design update for Windows 11, targeting all legacy UI elements, including the rarely seen "Installing Windows 11" screen. The company aims to establish a more consistent design language, addressing the historical lack of cohesion in the operating system's interface. This initiative reflects Microsoft's commitment to modernizing the user experience across the platform.

sports.title: Bangladesh survive late scare to take 1-0 lead
sports.summary: Bangladesh secured a narrow victory against Sri Lanka in the first ODI in Rajshahi, taking a 1-0 lead in the series. Chasing 206 runs, Bangladesh appeared in control but lost four quick wickets while needing just 7 runs to win. Ultimately, they managed to cross the finish line, overcoming the late scare to clinch the match.

sports.title: Bangladesh survive late scare to take 1-0 lead
sports.summary: Bangladesh took a 1-0 lead in the ODI series against Sri Lanka after a tense finish in Rajshahi. Chasing 206 runs, Bangladesh appeared secure at 199-3 but lost four quick wickets, raising concerns. Ultimately, they managed to secure the victory, finishing at 207-7. Sharmin Akhter's performance was crucial in guiding the team toward their target.

sports.title: 'Ghabraiye, aap Mullanpur mein hain': Arshdeep Singh's jab at Lucknow after PBKS win breaks internet - Watch
sports.summary: Punjab Kings' fast bowler Arshdeep Singh humorously altered the popular Lucknow tagline, "Muskuraiye, aap Lucknow mein hain," after his team's victory over Lucknow Super Giants. His playful remark, "Ghabraiye, aap Mullanpur mein hain," resonated with fans online, showcasing the lighter side of competitive cricket. The match highlighted Punjab Kings' dominance, further fueling excitement among supporters.

health.title: Medicover Hospitals Launch Comprehensive Liver Clinic in Navi Mumbai
health.summary: Medicover Hospitals has inaugurated a Comprehensive Liver Clinic in Navi Mumbai to address the increasing prevalence of liver-related conditions. The clinic aims to enhance early detection, provide timely interventions, and ensure long-term management of liver diseases. This initiative is part of a broader effort to improve healthcare services and outcomes for patients suffering from liver ailments in the region.

health.title: Blood Pressure Drug Shows Promise Against MRSA, Study Finds
health.summary: A study has found that a blood pressure medication may be effective against MRSA, a significant antibiotic-resistant infection. In the U.S., antibiotic-resistant infections lead to over 2.8 million cases and more than 35,000 deaths annually. Researchers are investigating alternative treatments to combat these infections, highlighting the ongoing global health challenge posed by antibiotic resistance.

health.title: Meghalaya steps up surveillance to prevent measles outbreak in East Khasi Hills
health.summary: Health authorities in East Khasi Hills, Meghalaya, have increased surveillance and preventive measures to avert a measles outbreak, prompted by recent cases in neighboring Bangladesh. Officials announced on April 20 that all relevant departments are instructed to enhance early detection and response strategies. The initiative aims to protect the local population and ensure public health safety amid rising concerns.

science.title: Here’s how to spot Comet Pan-STARRS and ‘Shooting Stars’ together: Best time to watch the celestial view
science.summary: Astronomers highlight the rarity of viewing comets with the naked eye. The upcoming simultaneous appearance of Comet Pan-STARRS and the Lyrid meteor shower presents a unique opportunity for both enthusiasts and casual observers. The best time to witness this celestial event is before dawn, encouraging people to step outside and enjoy the spectacle of shooting stars alongside the comet.

science.title: Scientists find a new critical point in supercooled water
science.summary: Researchers at Stockholm University have identified a critical point in supercooled water at -63 °C through X-ray experiments. This finding supports the theory that water can exist in two distinct phases. The team utilized ultrafast laser pulses to investigate the properties of supercooled liquid water, providing experimental evidence for this long-predicted phenomenon in the behavior of water.

science.title: What's the best time to see Lyrid meteors in 2026?
science.summary: The Lyrid meteor shower is approaching its peak activity, providing an excellent opportunity for skywatchers to observe shooting stars. To maximize chances of spotting these fast-moving meteors, it's important to know the best viewing times and locations in the spring sky. Detailed guidance on optimal conditions for observing the Lyrids will enhance the experience for enthusiasts.

entertainment.title: Marvel fans are convinced the Avengers: Doomsday trailer will be officially released soon after cryptic social media tease
entertainment.summary: Marvel fans anticipate the imminent release of the first trailer for "Avengers: Doomsday" following a cryptic tease from Marvel's Latin America account on X. The tweet, featuring the phrase "*suena música de Avengers*," has sparked speculation about the trailer's arrival. Enthusiasm among fans is growing as they await further announcements regarding the highly anticipated film.

entertainment.title: Kajol pens heartfelt note for Nysa Devgn’s 23rd birthday: 'The world changed the day you were born'
entertainment.summary: Kajol celebrated her daughter Nysa Devgn’s 23rd birthday with a heartfelt Instagram post, expressing that “her world changed the day Nysa was born.” The tribute included cherished memories from Durga Puja. Nysa, born on April 20, 2003, also received warm wishes from her aunt Tanishaa Mukerji, highlighting the family's love and support on this special occasion.

entertainment.title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection day 31 [LIVE]: Can Ranveer Singh film rake in Rs. 118 crore to beat 'Pushpa 2's collection?
entertainment.summary: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has completed 33 days in theaters, accumulating a total India net collection of Rs. 1,115.85 crore. The film, featuring Ranveer Singh and R. Madhavan, recorded a strong Day 32 collection of Rs. 5.20 crore. It remains to be seen if it can surpass 'Pushpa 2's collection, currently standing at Rs. 118 crore.
